description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_pipeline, mutagen.mutators, mutagen.cli, mutagen.json_schema

**BUCKET TICKET** — placeholder for the Low-tier (T3) polish items from the critical review. Not a single PR — to be split into multiple bw tickets `.31a`, `.31b`, etc. as they come up. This ticket is the index.

Source: /Users/mz/vaults/rmbrs-vault/code_review/critical/mutagen_ex-mutagen-wrd/2026-05-13/epic-mutagen-wrd/20260513-204355-consolidated.md (rows F47-F71).

## Items in scope

| F-ID | Subject | File | Estimate |
|---|---|---|---|
| F47 | Golden warnings-normalisation match too broad | end_to_end_test.exs:1255-1257 | XS |
| F48 | mutation_loop.ex has no dedicated test file | mutation_runner/mutation_loop.ex | S |
| F49 | config.ex and types.ex have no dedicated test files | config.ex, types.ex | XS |
| F50 | Property tests use :rand not StreamData | mutators_property_test.exs, scope_resolver_property_test.exs, mutation_enumerator_property_test.exs | M (could defer to v1.1) |
| F51 | E2e mutator scenarios assert site existence only, not count | end_to_end_test.exs:516-523 et al. | S |
| F52 | ExUnit.configure(max_cases: 1) set globally, never restored | baseline.ex:80-93, coverage_runner.ex:299-307, mutation_runner.ex:171-184 | XS |
| F53 | AST cache has no source-byte SHA-256 / TOCTOU | ast_cache.ex:86-108 | S |
| F54 | Macro.to_string round-trip → ANSI/control chars in JSON | mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:538-552 | XS |
| F55 | tag:NAME parse atom-charset unbounded (sub-finding of F6) | test_selector.ex:107-109, 247-266 | XS (covered by .20) |
| F56 | :cover loader uses unverified wildcard | coverage_runner.ex:166-205 | S |
| F57 | Single-condition cond should be if | cli.ex:102-114, mutagen.ex:189-196 | XS |
| F58 | extract_arrow_pair_strict + _safe duplication | mutators/with_swap.ex:91-101 | XS |
| F59 | Mutators.normalize/1 recomputed twice per pipeline site | mutators/pipeline.ex:46-52 | XS |
| F60 | `:default` sentinel in Map.get | cli.ex:179, 193, 207 | XS |
| F61 | Atom.to_string vs to_string/1 mixed | mutation_runner.ex:160 | XS |
| F62 | `:otp_release` returns major only | mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:471-473 | XS |
| F63 | compose_warnings does 3 list traversals | mutation_runner.ex:512-517 | XS |
| F64 | dedup_preserve_order uses MapSet for ≤10 entries | test_selector.ex:385-396 | XS |
| F65 | coverage_to_wire pattern | json_reporter.ex:270-285 | XS |
| F66 | register_test_modules_for_phase!/1 swallows rescue/catch silently | end_to_end_test.exs:1048-1060 | S |
| F67 | C2 spike thresholds baseline on dirty BEAM | integration/c2_test.exs:101-149 | S |
| F68 | Mutator catalog ordering pinned by `==` | mutators_test.exs:7-23 | XS |
| F69 | `--seed` end-to-end propagation untested | cli_test.exs:149-178 | S |
| F70 | Self-mutation refusal priority vs other CLI guards | cli_test.exs:241-296 | S |
| F71 | failure_collector default `[]`; production wiring untested | baseline.ex:151, end_to_end_test.exs:727-737 | S |

## Suggested batching

- `.31a` (idiomatic polish): F57 + F58 + F59 + F60 + F61 + F63 + F64 + F65
- `.31b` (test additions): F48 + F49 + F51 + F69 + F70 + F71
- `.31c` (golden / spike hardening): F47 + F66 + F67 + F68
- `.31d` (security hygiene): F53 + F54 + F56
- `.31e` (max_cases restoration): F52
- `.31f` (deferred / out-of-scope decision): F50 (StreamData migration — likely deferred to v1.1 per Wont-Have list)

## Workflow

- This ticket stays open as the index until F47-F71 are addressed (or descoped via /descope)
- Each `.31x` becomes a real bw ticket as it gets prioritized
- Polish work can land continuously on main after .19 merge gate is met

## Merge gate
- N/A for this bucket — sub-tickets carry their own gates
title: T3 polish bucket — F47-F71 (split into .31a..f as they come up)
